data.title: MSI named Top 60 Companies to Sell For in 2025. Leading supplier of flooring, etc. in North America.
data.description: Headquartered in Orange, California, as of July 24, 2025, M S International, Inc. (MSI) has been acknowledged as one of the Top 60 Companies to Sell For in 2025. Known as the primary provider of flooring, countertops, wall tile, and hardscaping products in North America, MSI is proud to achieve this recognition for the fourth year in a row.

data.title: Therap Services introduces About Me Video Attachment feature for better support, leading in electronic documentation.
data.description: Torrington, Connecticut, on July 24, 2025 - A company called Therap Services, known for providing HIPAA-compliant electronic documentation solutions, stands as a national leader in catering to organizations within the Long-Term Services and Supports (LTSS) sector, Home and Community-Based Services (HCBS), and other human services industries.

data.title: Twentyeight Health launches personalized care program with on-demand virtual consultations, weight management, and skincare. Evolving into comprehensive women's health platform, prioritizing personalized care.
data.description: In a groundbreaking move, the organization is transforming into an all-encompassing women's health hub, establishing a pioneering benchmark for women's healthcare. The focus will be on individualized treatment rather than standard prescriptions and isolated medical advice. This transformation is taking place in New York and was announced on July 24, 2025. Twentyeight Health, the primary figure in this evolution, is leading the way in this shift.

data.title: Inventor from Canton, Ohio creates skateboard for two riders, designed to support additional weight.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on July 24, 2025, an inventor from Canton, Ohio, shared his inspiration behind the creation of the SKATEBOARD. The inventor expressed the need for a solution that could allow a second rider on a skateboard, leading to the development of this innovative design. The SKATEBOARD is designed to comfortably accommodate the weight of an additional rider, enhancing the experience for users. Details about the skateboard's features and benefits were not disclosed in the statement.

data.title: Winpak Ltd. reports Q2 2025 results: Revenue $272.8M, Net income $29.9M. A decrease in gross profit margins due to various factors. Forecasting sales volume growth and stable raw material costs. Earnings show a decline in Q2 compared to the same quarter in 2024.
data.description: Winpak Ltd. reported consolidated results for the second quarter of 2025 ending on June 29. Revenue was $272.8 million, with net income of $29.9 million. EBITDA stood at $51.1 million. The company manufactures and distributes packaging materials and machines for perishable foods, beverages, and healthcare. Despite challenges in the trade environment, Winpak remains optimistic about profitability for the rest of 2025. Quarterly revenue decreased by 3.8%, attributed to lower volumes within certain product categories. Gross profit margins decreased by 3.1% due to higher expenses. Winpak forecasts capital expenditures of $100-110 million for 2025 and expects stable raw material costs for the year.

data.title: Anchorage Digital launches stablecoin issuance platform after GENIUS bill approval, joining the trend in a rising industry.
data.description: After the passage of the GENIUS bill into law, a digital asset service company has joined the trend of companies making moves related to stablecoins. This company is one of several firms that have taken action in response to the new legislation. The GENIUS bill's passage has sparked increased interest and activity in the stablecoin sector, with many companies adapting their strategies to align with the new regulatory framework. This development highlights the growing significance of stablecoins in the digital asset industry.

data.title: Trump's upset over Fed renovations, set to visit construction site with officials amid allegations of mismanagement.
data.description: On Thursday, President Trump will be visiting the construction site of the central bank along with administration officials. The visit comes in light of allegations that the project, which has incurred significant costs, has been poorly handled.
Brazilian President Lula States "Trump Does Not Want To Talk To Me, Otherwise He Would Call Me"

data.title: CNCF survey shows 60% of Kubernetes clusters use Argo CD, praised for 3.0 performance & security.
data.description: A recent survey found that approximately 60% of Kubernetes clusters under the management of respondents are currently dependent on Argo CD. This notable preference is attributed to the high satisfaction levels stemming from the 3.0 version's improved performance and security enhancements. This information was disclosed in San Francisco on July 24, 2025, by the Cloud Native Computing Foundation (CNCF), an organization dedicated to establishing lasting ecosystems in the technology sector.
Brazil's Lula Announces Regulation for Big Tech Companies In Brazil

data.title: SES and Luxembourg Govt to launch GovSat-2 satellite for secure communication, with GovSat-1 to provide reliable services.
data.description: Luxembourg-based SES and the Luxembourg Government have unveiled their collaboration to launch a second satellite for GovSat, a joint venture between the two entities, offering secure satellite communication services for governments. The new satellite, GovSat-2, will be positioned over the European satellite arc, complementing the existing GovSat-1. This venture, set as a 50/50 partnership, aims to enhance connectivity services for government clients.

data.title: Sui Blockchain now offers full beta gRPC support, improving data access and real-time streaming, transitioning from JSON-RPC.
data.description: The Sui Blockchain platform has rolled out extensive beta support for gRPC, significantly boosting data access and real-time streaming capabilities. This transition from JSON-RPC to gRPC signifies a move towards a more efficient and scalable API. This update is expected to accelerate performance on the platform, catering to the needs of users seeking enhanced speed and responsiveness in their interactions.

data.title: Amtrak's Pacific Surfliner will pause train service north of Goleta for bridge replacement project. Lossan Rail Corridor Agency oversees the service.
data.description: Orange, California, July 24, 2025 – A project aimed at replacing a bridge is set to improve safety and operations. The Los Angeles – San Diego – San Luis Obispo Rail Corridor Agency, overseeing Amtrak® Pacific Surfliner® service, disclosed today that the initiative will benefit train services heading north.

data.title: New Toll Brothers model home opens in Dripping Springs, TX, offering luxury single-family homes with resort-style amenities at Headwaters.
data.description: Toll Brothers presents upscale single-family residences with access to upscale amenities in the popular Headwaters community. Luxury homes and resort-style facilities are available.

data.title: Cielo gets ISO 42001 certification using FairNow's AI platform, easing pre-audit process. Key info: Cielo, ISO 42001, FairNow, Washington, July 24, 2025.
data.description: FairNow was specifically designed to manage AI on the application front, aiding in streamlining Cielo's pre-audit procedure by consolidating risks, controls, and documentation within a unified system. On July 24, 2025, Washington-based Cielo, a major Talent Acquisition Partner globally, disclosed that with the assistance of FairNow, they were able to enhance their operational efficiency.
